scripts.title: Simple RSI Overbought/Oversold
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Simple RSI", overlay=false)
len = input.int(14, "RSI Length", minval=1)
src = input.source(close, "Source")
rsiVal = ta.rsi(src, len)
upper = input.int(70, "Overbought")
lower = input.int(30, "Oversold")
plot(rsiVal, "RSI", color=color.new(color.purple, 0), linewidth=2)
hline(upper, "Overbought", color=color.red)
hline(lower, "Oversold", color=color.green)
hline(50, "Midline", color=color.gray, linestyle=hline.style_dotted)
bgcolor(rsiVal > upper ? color.new(color.red, 90) : rsiVal < lower ? color.new(color.green, 90) : na)

scripts.title: EMA Ribbon Trend
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("EMA Ribbon", overlay=true)
e1 = ta.ema(close, 8)
e2 = ta.ema(close, 13)
e3 = ta.ema(close, 21)
e4 = ta.ema(close, 34)
e5 = ta.ema(close, 55)
trendUp = e1 > e2 and e2 > e3 and e3 > e4 and e4 > e5
col = trendUp ? color.lime : color.orange
plot(e1, "EMA8", color=col)
plot(e2, "EMA13", color=col)
plot(e3, "EMA21", color=col)
plot(e4, "EMA34", color=col)
plot(e5, "EMA55", color=col)

scripts.title: MACD Histogram Cross
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("MACD Cross", overlay=false)
fast = input.int(12, "Fast")
slow = input.int(26, "Slow")
sig = input.int(9, "Signal")
[macdLine, signalLine, hist] = ta.macd(close, fast, slow, sig)
histCol = hist >= 0 ? (hist[1] < hist ? color.lime : color.green) : (hist[1] > hist ? color.red : color.maroon)
plot(hist, "Hist", style=plot.style_columns, color=histCol)
plot(macdLine, "MACD", color=color.blue)
plot(signalLine, "Signal", color=color.orange)
alertcondition(ta.crossover(macdLine, signalLine), "MACD Bull", "MACD crossed up")
alertcondition(ta.crossunder(macdLine, signalLine), "MACD Bear", "MACD crossed down")

scripts.title: Bollinger Bands %B
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("BB Percent B", overlay=false)
length = input.int(20, "Length")
mult = input.float(2.0, "StdDev Mult")
bb(src, len, m) =>
    basis = ta.sma(src, len)
    dev = m * ta.stdev(src, len)
    upper = basis + dev
    lower = basis - dev
    [upper, lower]
[u, l] = bb(close, length, mult)
pctB = (close - l) / (u - l)
plot(pctB, "%B", color=color.teal, linewidth=2)
hline(1.0, "Top", color=color.red)
hline(0.0, "Bottom", color=color.green)
hline(0.5, "Mid", color=color.gray)

scripts.title: Stochastic %K %D
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Stochastic", overlay=false)
kLen = input.int(14, "%K Length")
kSmooth = input.int(3, "%K Smoothing")
dSmooth = input.int(3, "%D Smoothing")
k = ta.sma(ta.stoch(close, high, low, kLen), kSmooth)
d = ta.sma(k, dSmooth)
plot(k, "%K", color=color.blue)
plot(d, "%D", color=color.orange)
top = hline(80)
bot = hline(20)
fill(top, bot, color=color.new(color.blue, 92))

scripts.title: ADX Directional Trend
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("ADX Trend Strength", overlay=false)
len = input.int(14, "DI Length")
adxLen = input.int(14, "ADX Smoothing")
[diPlus, diMinus, adx] = ta.dmi(len, adxLen)
strongCol = adx > 25 ? color.white : color.gray
plot(adx, "ADX", color=strongCol, linewidth=2)
plot(diPlus, "+DI", color=color.green)
plot(diMinus, "-DI", color=color.red)
hline(25, "Trend Threshold", color=color.yellow, linestyle=hline.style_dashed)

scripts.title: Supertrend Overlay
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Supertrend", overlay=true)
factor = input.float(3.0, "Factor")
atrPeriod = input.int(10, "ATR Length")
[supertrend, direction] = ta.supertrend(factor, atrPeriod)
upTrend = plot(direction < 0 ? supertrend : na, "Up", color=color.green, style=plot.style_linebr)
dnTrend = plot(direction > 0 ? supertrend : na, "Down", color=color.red, style=plot.style_linebr)
buySig = direction < 0 and direction[1] > 0
sellSig = direction > 0 and direction[1] < 0
plotshape(buySig, "Buy", shape.triangleup, location.belowbar, color.green, size=size.small)
plotshape(sellSig, "Sell", shape.triangledown, location.abovebar, color.red, size=size.small)

scripts.title: RSI Divergence Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=6
strategy("RSI Reversal", overlay=true, initial_capital=10000, default_qty_type=strategy.percent_of_equity, default_qty_value=100)
len = input.int(14, "RSI Length")
rsiVal = ta.rsi(close, len)
longCond = ta.crossover(rsiVal, 30)
shortCond = ta.crossunder(rsiVal, 70)
if longCond
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if shortCond and strategy.position_size > 0
    strategy.close("Long")
strategy.exit("Stop", "Long", stop=strategy.position_avg_price * 0.97, limit=strategy.position_avg_price * 1.06)
plot(rsiVal, "RSI", display=display.data_window)

scripts.title: EMA Crossover Strategy with Stop
scripts.source:
//@version=6
strategy("EMA Cross", overlay=true)
fastLen = input.int(9, "Fast EMA")
slowLen = input.int(21, "Slow EMA")
fast = ta.ema(close, fastLen)
slow = ta.ema(close, slowLen)
longSig = ta.crossover(fast, slow)
shortSig = ta.crossunder(fast, slow)
if longSig
    strategy.entry("L", strategy.long)
if shortSig
    strategy.entry("S", strategy.short)
longStop = strategy.position_avg_price * 0.98
longTP = strategy.position_avg_price * 1.04
strategy.exit("XL", "L", stop=longStop, limit=longTP)
plot(fast, color=color.aqua)
plot(slow, color=color.orange)
plot(strategy.openprofit, "Open PnL", display=display.data_window)

scripts.title: Bollinger Band Breakout Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=6
strategy("BB Breakout", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20)
mult = input.float(2.0)
mode = input.string("Breakout", "Mode", options=["Breakout", "Reversion"])
basis = ta.sma(close, len)
dev = mult * ta.stdev(close, len)
upper = basis + dev
lower = basis - dev
longCond = switch mode
    "Breakout" => ta.crossover(close, upper)
    "Reversion" => ta.crossover(close, lower)
    => false
if longCond
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
strategy.exit("Exit", "Long", stop=lower, limit=upper)
plot(basis, color=color.blue)
plot(upper, color=color.gray)
plot(lower, color=color.gray)

scripts.title: Single-Line Function Library Demo
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Func Demo", overlay=true)
midpoint(h, l) => (h + l) / 2
weighted(c, o) => (c * 2 + o) / 3
detrend(src, len) => src - ta.ema(src, len)
mp = midpoint(high, low)
wt = weighted(close, open)
dt = detrend(close, 20)
plot(mp, "Midpoint", color=color.blue)
plot(wt, "Weighted", color=color.orange)
plot(ta.ema(close, 20) + dt, "Reconstructed", color=color.new(color.gray, 60))

scripts.title: Recursive Zero-Lag Filter
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Zero Lag EMA", overlay=true)
length = input.int(21, "Length")
alpha = 2.0 / (length + 1)
var float zlema = na
ema1 = ta.ema(close, length)
lag = ema1 - ta.ema(ema1, length)
src = close + lag
zlema := na(zlema[1]) ? src : alpha * src + (1 - alpha) * nz(zlema[1])
plot(zlema, "ZLEMA", color=color.fuchsia, linewidth=2)
plot(ema1, "EMA", color=color.new(color.gray, 50))

scripts.title: Custom Recursive Smoother (RMA style)
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Manual RMA vs ta.rma", overlay=false)
len = input.int(14, "Length")
myRma(src, length) =>
    a = 1.0 / length
    var float sm = na
    sm := na(sm[1]) ? ta.sma(src, length) : a * src + (1 - a) * nz(sm[1])
    sm
mine = myRma(close, len)
builtin = ta.rma(close, len)
plot(mine, "Manual RMA", color=color.blue, linewidth=2)
plot(builtin, "ta.rma", color=color.new(color.red, 40))
plot(mine - builtin, "Diff", color=color.gray, display=display.data_window)

scripts.title: Bars Since Last Signal Counter
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Bars Since Cross", overlay=false)
fast = ta.ema(close, 12)
slow = ta.ema(close, 26)
bullCross = ta.crossover(fast, slow)
bearCross = ta.crossunder(fast, slow)
barsSinceBull = ta.barssince(bullCross)
barsSinceBear = ta.barssince(bearCross)
sinceLast = math.min(nz(barsSinceBull, 9999), nz(barsSinceBear, 9999))
plot(sinceLast, "Bars Since Any Cross", style=plot.style_columns, color=barsSinceBull < barsSinceBear ? color.green : color.red)

scripts.title: ValueWhen Pivot Reference
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("ValueWhen Levels", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20, "Lookback")
isHigh = high == ta.highest(high, len)
isLow = low == ta.lowest(low, len)
lastSwingHigh = ta.valuewhen(isHigh, high, 0)
lastSwingLow = ta.valuewhen(isLow, low, 0)
prevSwingHigh = ta.valuewhen(isHigh, high, 1)
plot(lastSwingHigh, "Swing High", color=color.red, style=plot.style_stepline)
plot(lastSwingLow, "Swing Low", color=color.green, style=plot.style_stepline)
plot(prevSwingHigh, "Prev High", color=color.new(color.red, 60), style=plot.style_stepline)

scripts.title: Cumulative Volume Delta Proxy
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Cumulative Delta Proxy", overlay=false)
delta = close > open ? volume : close < open ? -volume : 0.0
cvd = ta.cum(delta)
smoothed = ta.ema(cvd, 21)
plot(cvd, "CVD", color=cvd >= 0 ? color.green : color.red, style=plot.style_area, color=color.new(color.green, 70))
plot(smoothed, "CVD EMA", color=color.white, linewidth=2)
hline(0, "Zero", color=color.gray)

scripts.title: Hull Moving Average Trend
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("HMA Trend", overlay=true)
len = input.int(55, "HMA Length")
hma = ta.hma(close, len)
rising = hma > hma[1]
col = rising ? color.lime : color.red
plot(hma, "HMA", color=col, linewidth=3)
flipUp = rising and not rising[1]
flipDn = not rising and rising[1]
plotshape(flipUp, "Turn Up", shape.circle, location.belowbar, color.green, size=size.tiny)
plotshape(flipDn, "Turn Down", shape.circle, location.abovebar, color.red, size=size.tiny)
alertcondition(flipUp, "HMA Up", "HMA turned up")
alertcondition(flipDn, "HMA Down", "HMA turned down")

scripts.title: Standard Deviation Volatility Bands
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Deviation Bands", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20, "Length")
basis = ta.linreg(close, len, 0)
deviation = ta.dev(close, len)
upper = basis + 1.5 * deviation
lower = basis - 1.5 * deviation
b = plot(basis, "Regression", color=color.blue)
u = plot(upper, "Upper", color=color.new(color.blue, 50))
l = plot(lower, "Lower", color=color.new(color.blue, 50))
fill(u, l, color=color.new(color.blue, 90))

scripts.title: Linear Regression Channel Slope
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("LinReg Slope", overlay=false)
len = input.int(50, "Length")
lr = ta.linreg(close, len, 0)
lrPrev = ta.linreg(close, len, 1)
slope = lr - lrPrev
normSlope = slope / ta.atr(len) * 100
col = normSlope > 0 ? color.new(color.green, 20) : color.new(color.red, 20)
plot(normSlope, "Normalized Slope", style=plot.style_columns, color=col)
hline(0, color=color.gray)

scripts.title: For-Loop Momentum Sum
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Rolling Momentum Sum", overlay=false)
length = input.int(20, "Window")
float momSum = 0.0
for i = 0 to length - 1
    momSum += close[i] > close[i + 1] ? 1 : -1
normalized = momSum / length
plot(normalized, "Momentum Balance", color=normalized > 0 ? color.green : color.red, style=plot.style_histogram)
hline(0.5, color=color.new(color.green, 70))
hline(-0.5, color=color.new(color.red, 70))
hline(0, color=color.gray)

scripts.title: For-Loop Weighted Average Price
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Manual WMA", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20, "Length")
float num = 0.0
float den = 0.0
for i = 0 to len - 1
    weight = len - i
    num += close[i] * weight
    den += weight
myWma = num / den
plot(myWma, "Manual WMA", color=color.orange, linewidth=2)
plot(ta.wma(close, len), "ta.wma", color=color.new(color.blue, 50))

scripts.title: Trend Score Aggregator
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Trend Score", overlay=false)
score = 0
score += close > ta.ema(close, 20) ? 1 : -1
score += close > ta.ema(close, 50) ? 1 : -1
score += close > ta.ema(close, 200) ? 1 : -1
score += ta.rsi(close, 14) > 50 ? 1 : -1
score += ta.macd(close, 12, 26, 9) > 0 ? 1 : -1
labelCol = switch
    score >= 3 => color.green
    score <= -3 => color.red
    => color.gray
plot(score, "Score", style=plot.style_columns, color=labelCol)
hline(0, color=color.gray)

scripts.title: ATR Trailing Stop Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=6
strategy("ATR Trailing Stop", overlay=true)
atrLen = input.int(14, "ATR Length")
mult = input.float(3.0, "Multiplier")
atr = ta.atr(atrLen)
var float trail = na
longMa = ta.ema(close, 50)
goLong = ta.crossover(close, longMa)
if goLong and strategy.position_size == 0
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
    trail := close - atr * mult
if strategy.position_size > 0
    trail := math.max(nz(trail[1]), close - atr * mult)
    strategy.exit("Trail", "Long", stop=trail)
plot(strategy.position_size > 0 ? trail : na, "Trail", color=color.red, style=plot.style_linebr)

scripts.title: Donchian Channel Breakout Strategy
scripts.source:
//@version=6
strategy("Donchian Breakout", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20, "Channel Length")
upper = ta.highest(high, len)[1]
lower = ta.lowest(low, len)[1]
mid = (upper + lower) / 2
longCond = high > upper
exitCond = low < mid
if longCond
    strategy.entry("Long", strategy.long)
if exitCond
    strategy.close("Long")
strategy.exit("Protect", "Long", stop=lower)
plot(upper, "Upper", color=color.green)
plot(lower, "Lower", color=color.red)
plot(mid, "Mid", color=color.gray)
alertcondition(longCond, "Breakout", "Donchian breakout long")

scripts.title: Keltner Channel Squeeze
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Keltner Squeeze", overlay=true)
len = input.int(20)
bbMult = input.float(2.0)
kcMult = input.float(1.5)
basis = ta.sma(close, len)
dev = bbMult * ta.stdev(close, len)
bbUpper = basis + dev
bbLower = basis - dev
kcRange = kcMult * ta.atr(len)
kcUpper = basis + kcRange
kcLower = basis - kcRange
squeezeOn = bbLower > kcLower and bbUpper < kcUpper
plot(basis, "Basis", color=color.blue)
plotshape(squeezeOn, "Squeeze", shape.circle, location.bottom, color.yellow, size=size.tiny)
bgcolor(squeezeOn ? color.new(color.yellow, 90) : na)

scripts.title: Volume Weighted MACD (v5)
scripts.source:
//@version=5
indicator("VW-MACD", overlay=false)
fast = input.int(12)
slow = input.int(26)
sig = input.int(9)
vwmacd(src, f, s) =>
    fastLine = ta.vwma(src, f)
    slowLine = ta.vwma(src, s)
    fastLine - slowLine
macdLine = vwmacd(close, fast, slow)
signalLine = ta.ema(macdLine, sig)
hist = macdLine - signalLine
plot(hist, "Hist", style=plot.style_columns, color=hist >= 0 ? color.green : color.red)
plot(macdLine, "VW-MACD", color=color.blue)
plot(signalLine, "Signal", color=color.orange)

scripts.title: Pivot Point Standard Levels (v4)
scripts.source:
//@version=4
study("Daily Pivots", overlay=true)
prevHigh = security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", high[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
prevLow = security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", low[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
prevClose = security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", close[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
pivot = (prevHigh + prevLow + prevClose) / 3
r1 = 2 * pivot - prevLow
s1 = 2 * pivot - prevHigh
plot(pivot, "P", color=color.yellow, style=plot.style_stepline)
plot(r1, "R1", color=color.red, style=plot.style_stepline)
plot(s1, "S1", color=color.green, style=plot.style_stepline)

scripts.title: Multi-Timeframe RSI (request.security approximation)
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("MTF RSI Dashboard", overlay=false)
tf1 = input.timeframe("60", "Higher TF 1")
tf2 = input.timeframe("240", "Higher TF 2")
tf3 = input.timeframe("D", "Higher TF 3")
rsiCurrent = ta.rsi(close, 14)
rsiTf1 = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, tf1, ta.rsi(close, 14))
rsiTf2 = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, tf2, ta.rsi(close, 14))
rsiTf3 = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, tf3, ta.rsi(close, 14), lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_on)
plot(rsiCurrent, "Current", color=color.white)
plot(rsiTf1, "TF1", color=color.blue)
plot(rsiTf2, "TF2", color=color.orange)
plot(rsiTf3, "TF3", color=color.red)
hline(70)
hline(30)

scripts.title: Order Block Detector (arrays + drawing approximation)
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Order Blocks", overlay=true, max_boxes_count=50)
var array<float> obTops = array.new<float>()
var array<float> obBottoms = array.new<float>()
var array<box> boxes = array.new<box>()
bullOB = close > open and close[1] < open[1] and volume > ta.sma(volume, 20)
if bullOB
    array.push(obTops, high)
    array.push(obBottoms, low)
    b = box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index + 10, low, bgcolor=color.new(color.green, 80), border_color=color.green)
    array.push(boxes, b)
if array.size(boxes) > 20
    box.delete(array.shift(boxes))
    array.shift(obTops)
    array.shift(obBottoms)
line.new(bar_index, ta.sma(close, 50), bar_index + 5, ta.sma(close, 50), color=color.blue)

scripts.title: Pivot High Look-Ahead Supply Zones (REJECT - ta.pivothigh future offset)
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Pivot Zones", overlay=true)
leftBars = input.int(15, "Left")
rightBars = input.int(15, "Right")
ph = ta.pivothigh(high, leftBars, rightBars)
pl = ta.pivotlow(low, leftBars, rightBars)
if not na(ph)
    label.new(bar_index[rightBars], ph, "H", color=color.red, style=label.style_label_down, textcolor=color.white)
    line.new(bar_index[rightBars], ph, bar_index, ph, color=color.red, extend=extend.right)
if not na(pl)
    label.new(bar_index[rightBars], pl, "L", color=color.green, style=label.style_label_up, textcolor=color.white)
    line.new(bar_index[rightBars], pl, bar_index, pl, color=color.green, extend=extend.right)
plot(ph, "PH", offset=-rightBars, color=color.red)
plot(pl, "PL", offset=-rightBars, color=color.green)

scripts.title: Liquidity Heatmap with Matrix/Map (opaque visual approximation)
scripts.source:
//@version=6
indicator("Liquidity Heatmap", overlay=true, max_polylines_count=100, max_labels_count=200)
var matrix<float> grid = matrix.new<float>(10, 10, 0.0)
var map<int, float> levelMap = map.new<int, float>()
row = bar_index % 10
col = int(close * 10) % 10
matrix.set(grid, row, col, matrix.get(grid, row, col) + volume)
map.put(levelMap, int(close), nz(map.get(levelMap, int(close)), 0.0) + volume)
if barstate.islast
    for r = 0 to 9
        for c = 0 to 9
            v = matrix.get(grid, r, c)
            if v > 0
                label.new(bar_index - c, low * (1 + r / 100.0), str.tostring(v, format.volume), color=color.new(color.red, 50), size=size.tiny)
    var points = array.new<chart.point>()
    array.push(points, chart.point.now(close))
    polyline.new(points, line_color=color.blue)
